query: SELECT CONCAT(oo.order_id, '|', oo.driver_id, '|', oo.status) as offer_info FROM order_offers oo WHERE oo.driver_id = 30001 ORDER BY oo.id DESC LIMIT 10
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT CONCAT(oo.order_id, '|', oo.driver_id, '|', oo.status) as offer_info FROM order_offers oo WHERE oo.driver_id = 30001 ORDER BY oo.id DESC LIMIT 10
